violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Food removed from original packaging was not placed in a clean and sanitized container. Can of pineapples stored in can with no lid in cooler. Mash potatoes stored in bowl with plastic covering.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Hamburger patties, steaks taken out of original container with no date on container.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Lid of freezer is broken exposing insulation.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside stand up freezers need cleaning.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. Plates, bowls not covered or inverted.
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
